reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar, para descansar un poco para seguir viaje. Muy lindo parque arbolado. Baños muy limpios. Excelente atención.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to rest a bit before continuing your journey. Very nice wooded park. Very clean restrooms. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNjdHMU1REAE

reviews.comment:
La peor de la rta 2
Los baños una mugre
Años que hago esta ruta y solo paro aca por  exepcion
Me borre del aca hace mucho despues de pasar por esta est de ""servicio"""

(Translated by Google)
The worst on Route 2. The bathrooms are filthy. I've been doing this route for years and only stop here as an exception. I stopped using this route a long time ago after passing through this so-called "service" station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcTYyZzFRRRAB
